data.title: Extend test-ticket-subprocess-count.sh with write_commit_event zero-python3 coverage
data.description:
## Task
Add a test to tests/scripts/test-ticket-subprocess-count.sh that calls write_commit_event (or a ticket write op like ticket create/comment) and asserts python3 spawn count = 0. Follow existing patterns in that file. Testing mode: GREEN (implementation already exists).

## Story
29e5-0a74 — remediation from completion-verifier FAIL
